templates.title: The Midnight Detective
templates.template: A detective standing in the rain, heavy noir atmosphere. The city lights reflect on wet streets. A mysterious figure disappears around the corner.

templates.title: Neon Future
templates.template: A cyberpunk cityscape at night, neon lights everywhere. Flying vehicles zoom past towering skyscrapers. A hacker looks out from a high-rise apartment.

templates.title: Medieval Quest
templates.template: A medieval knight stands before an ancient castle. Dragons fly overhead. A magical sword glows with ethereal light.

templates.title: Sunset Romance
templates.template: Two people walking hand in hand on a beach at sunset. Soft watercolor sky. Gentle waves crash on the shore.

templates.title: City Chase
templates.template: A high-speed chase through city streets. Cars weaving through traffic. Explosions in the background.
